LightningComponentBundle.description: Queued document generation button with Generated Document status progress

property.name: templateId
property.label: Template ID
property.description: ID of the Docgen_Template__c record (alternative to Template Name)

property.name: templateName
property.label: Template Name
property.description: Name of the Docgen_Template__c record (alternative to Template ID)

property.name: outputFormat
property.label: Output Format Override
property.description: Optional document output format override. Leave blank to use the template default.

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: Custom label for the generation button

property.name: successMessage
property.label: Success Message
property.description: Custom message shown in success toast

property.name: openOnSuccess
property.label: Open File On Success
property.description: Open the generated Salesforce file when generation completes

property.name: previewBeforeSave
property.label: Preview Before Save
property.description: Show the generated file in this component and require Save or Cancel before linking it to parent records

property.name: hideButton
property.label: Hide Internal Button
property.description: Hide the component button when a parent component or Quick Action calls generate()

property.name: maxPollSeconds
property.label: Max Poll Seconds
property.description: Maximum time to poll Generated Document status
